prompt:
Use the uploaded portrait only as identity reference. Preserve the person’s real face shape, facial features, hairstyle, hair length, skin tone, and natural proportions. Do not copy the original portrait’s clothes, background, lighting, pose, or image quality.

Create a realistic cinematic portrait inspired by a romantic sunset rose field. The subject is standing among endless deep red roses, holding a bouquet of soft yellow roses, wearing a simple pale yellow blouse. She looks slightly upward with a calm, dreamy, emotional expression. Golden sunset backlight, warm sky, soft flying red petals, a few yellow butterflies around her hair and shoulders. Foreground roses slightly blurred, shallow depth of field, natural skin texture, real pores, soft cinematic color grading, elegant dreamy atmosphere, high-end outdoor photography, 9:16 vertical composition.

No text, no logo, no watermark.

anime, cartoon, illustration, plastic skin, fake face, over-smoothed skin, doll-like face, bad anatomy, distorted hands, extra fingers, blurry face, low quality, harsh AI look, unnatural eyes, messy hair, duplicated face, overexposed skin, watermark, text, logo, signature
